title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sexual assault and domestic violence support groups. 2208 SW 3rd Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic and sexual violence Hours: Meeting times vary Phone hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 754-0110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (541) 754-0110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corvallis Transit Route bus line 6 stops directly in front, off 3rd Street Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - EDUCATING TO END VIOLENCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS AND SUPPORT LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE & SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
